name: McDonald's
deal: Nazo 30th Birthday Promo — Special limited-edition promotional tier standalone burger options starting right at R29.90
howToClaim: Ask for the R30 Nazo value tier at the counter, drive-thru, or unlock the exclusive pricing tier directly inside the McDonald's SA App

name: KFC
deal: Streetwise 2 — 2 pieces of Original Recipe chicken and a small portion of chips for under R40
howToClaim: Order a Streetwise 2 over the counter, at the drive-thru, or via the KFC South Africa app

name: The Fish & Chip Co.
deal: Small Hake & Mini Chips combo — hot battered hake fillet served with a 200g portion of straight-cut chips for R47.90
howToClaim: Order in-store at any local branch for takeaway or collection

name: The Fish & Chip Co.
deal: Small Russian & Mini Chips combo — classic smoked Russian sausage with a 200g portion of chips for R42.90
howToClaim: Ask for the Small Russian and Mini Chips meal option at the counter

name: Nando's
deal: Casa Deals value tier — budget-friendly signature meals like a 1/4 chicken and side starting from R65
howToClaim: Order from the Casa Deals section of the menu in-store, drive-thru, or via the Nando's app

name: Steers
deal: Wacky Wednesday — get two classic Steers beef or chicken burgers for a heavily discounted promotional price
howToClaim: Order the Wacky Wednesday promotional bundle at any Steers branch, drive-thru, or via the Steers delivery app

name: Debonairs Pizza
deal: Real Deal Pizzas — everyday pocket-friendly value tier featuring small (19cm) select pizzas from R39.90 to R44.90
howToClaim: Order any pizza from the Real Deal menu category online, on the app, or at any Debonairs counter

name: Wimpy
deal: Quick Bites Mzansi Breakfast — classic breakfast featuring 1 egg, 2 rashers of bacon, and toast at a budget-friendly everyday price
howToClaim: Order from the Quick Bites section of the menu at any Wimpy branch during breakfast hours

name: FreshStop
deal: Food & Coffee Combo — pair a standard Seattle Coffee Co. blend with selected hot food items for a discounted combo price
howToClaim: Visit any Caltex/Astron Energy FreshStop forecourt. Select a qualifying hot food item and pair it with a Seattle coffee at the till
